title: cheilanthes brevifrons
intro: Cheilanthes brevifrons, also known as the short-fronded lip fern, is a species of fern native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its short fronds and distinctive lip-like structure. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Cheilanthes brevifrons include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. Cheilanthes brevifrons can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in poultices and salves to treat various health issues.
